author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
FINAL FANTASY VII REBIRTH – Launch Trailer – Nintendo Switch 2
Play FINAL FANTASY VII REBIRTH now on Nintendo Switch 2! Try the free demo and carry over your save data to the full game: https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/final-fantasy-vii-rebirth-switch-2/?utm_source=SW&utm_medium=soytnoa&utm_campaign=P1057-01&utm_id=P1057-01 

After escaping Midgar, join Cloud and his friends on an epic journey across the planet in pursuit of Sephiroth. Ride chocobos, sprint across sweeping plains, and explore a vibrant, expansive world as the party journeys to the Forgotten Capital from the original FINAL FANTASY VII.  

#NintendoSwitch2 #FFVIIR 

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s

Subscribe for more Nintendo fun: https://goo.gl/HYYsot
